easy_card_1.description: Limitations section is completely absent. No failure modes, edge cases, or known weaknesses are documented.
easy_card_1.suggested_fix: Add a limitations section detailing known failure modes, dataset biases, and deployment constraints.

easy_card_1.description: No bias analysis section provided. A text classifier can exhibit biases based on training data demographics.
easy_card_1.suggested_fix: Add a bias analysis section examining performance across demographic groups and content types.

easy_card_1.description: Environmental impact section is missing entirely.
easy_card_1.suggested_fix: Add estimated training compute, GPU hours, and CO2 emissions.

easy_card_2.suggested_fix: Document known failure cases such as sarcasm, mixed sentiment, and domain-specific language.

easy_card_2.description: No bias analysis section. Sentiment models are known to exhibit biases across demographic groups.
easy_card_2.suggested_fix: Add bias analysis examining performance across product categories, language styles, and demographic indicators.
Document potential misuse scenarios and ethical implications of automated sentiment scoring.
Add training compute costs and carbon footprint estimates.

easy_card_3.description: Intended use section is missing. Users cannot determine appropriate deployment contexts.
easy_card_3.suggested_fix: Add clear intended use cases, target environments, and expected users.
Document ethical implications of object detection, especially regarding surveillance applications.
Add proper academic citation for the model and its base architecture.
